description_long: This is a modern mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior is predominantly white with bold black vertical and horizontal accents, creating a striking contrast. Large, regularly spaced windows line the longer sides of the building, providing ample natural light to the interior offices. The ground floor features a recessed entryway and glass storefronts, while the upper floors are set back slightly, giving the structure a tiered appearance. A rooftop area and a small pool or terrace are visible on one side, suggesting amenities for occupants. The building sits adjacent to a paved street and includes a sidewalk and landscaped elements at the base.
description: A modern, white office building with black accents, large windows, and a recessed ground-floor entry, featuring a rooftop terrace and adjacent street access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, ground-level glass storefronts, and the street-facing facade with strong vertical black accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the regular window pattern, rooftop terrace with a pool, and the building's clean, flat surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid wall with minimal windows and a prominent vertical black stripe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the windowed facade, rooftop terrace, and the building's integration with the street and sidewalk.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, rectangular windows in horizontal rows along the longer facades, with consistent vertical alignment and repetition.
attribute_building_entrance_type: recessed entry with double glass doors
